name: submit_offer
description: Submit a carrier's counter-offer to the pricing engine and get a decision: agreed, counter, or walked_away. Pass the FULL negotiation state every time (the engine is stateless). Use the returned suggested_response verbatim or lightly paraphrased. Hard cap at 3 rounds. Never quote below the floor the engine enforces — if status is 'walked_away', end the negotiation gracefully.

parameters.name: load_id
parameters.description: The load_id of the load being negotiated (from search_loads response).

parameters.name: loadboard_rate
parameters.description: The original listed loadboard rate for this load (USD, no symbols).

parameters.name: round
parameters.description: Which round this is. 1 on the carrier's first counter-offer, 2 on their second, 3 on their third. Never exceed 3.

parameters.name: agent_last_offer
parameters.description: Your most recent quoted rate. On round 1 this equals loadboard_rate.

parameters.name: carrier_offer
parameters.description: The carrier's new counter-offer (USD, no symbols).

parameters.name: carrier_sentiment
parameters.description: Your read of the carrier's emotional state: positive | neutral | skeptical | frustrated | hostile. Influences concession depth on rounds 2-3.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin for the loading load (used in the suggested_response template).
